commentText: Christiano Vibes🔥 • Mar 11 (edited)Im pretty confused about it myself I've always thought jesus is the son of god so while he has a similar role he's like different yet the same. Its also tricky to ask some as they get a lil intense. Personally I feel like I dont know & wouldnt even know without pi

tags.reasoning: He is being vulnerable and honest about his confusion, so I want to acknowledge that and make him feel seen.

reply: The way I see it, acknowledging something is a process, like phases. You're at a point of wanting to know and ready to acknowledge the truth. You've already entered the circle pretty deep, now is the time to really get into the core. I know it's going to be worth it in the end.

commentText: Nasaiah McEwan • Mar 13Do y’all believe that people may over-spiritualize certain things?
